retrieved_result: They Told me I was Pregnant, But it was Ovarian Cancer "By Meryl Davids Landau Jun 10, 2007 56NYRVAH, 34, art-gallery owner I've always been into eating right and exercising, so I was surprised when I developed a little potbelly. I also started getting the urge to urinate so often that I began to feel that if I was going to drink something, I'd be smart"
Decision_Reason: The retrieved result discusses pregnancy/ovarian cancer, not easy DIY room decoration ideas.

history.title: They Told me I was Pregnant, But it was Ovarian Cancer
history.description: "By Meryl Davids Landau Jun 10, 2007 56NYRVAH, 34, art-gallery owner I've always been into eating right and exercising, so I was surprised when I developed a little potbelly. I also started getting the urge to urinate so often that I began to feel that if I was going to drink something, I'd be smart
